implementation_cross_check.notes: Used only to cross-check model(linear), variable names, shock names, annual-inflation identity, posterior-mode parameter names, and steady-state derived-parameter objects. Not used as paper-side mathematical evidence.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

formula_quality.reason: First-pass extraction from MinerU Markdown. Financial-sector equations are directly available, but inherited Smets-Wouters blocks are not fully reprinted in the source paper and several OCR fragments require targeted PDF checks.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper.
